_meta.notes: Cash policy, position constraints, and conviction-gating guards. PortfolioConstructor is the ONLY agent that knows about portfolio state. Macro override defaults off based on backtest finding (-1.3 to -2.1% drag against +32.7% portfolio return on test universe).

cash_policy._floor_pct_doc: Minimum cash reserve as % of total portfolio value. Always enforced. 5% provides operational dry powder without meaningful drag.
cash_policy._macro_override_enabled_doc: When true, raises floor based on macro_regime (see macro_override_table). Defaults off — backtest showed it loses money on bull regimes because regime tags fire AFTER drawdowns.
cash_policy._macro_override_table_doc: Only applied when macro_override_enabled = true. Re-enable when there is multi-year backtest evidence including a real bear cycle.

constraints._max_position_pct_of_portfolio_doc: Single fund cannot exceed 10% of total portfolio value. Triggers Trim when held position drifts past this.
constraints._max_sector_pct_of_portfolio_doc: All funds sharing a metadata.category cannot exceed 30% combined. Refuses Buys that would breach this.
constraints._min_trade_kr_doc: Trades smaller than 5,000 kr are dropped to avoid uneconomic micro-allocations after conviction-rank scaling.

guards._skip_sell_below_conviction_doc: Sells with conviction < 0.40 are NOT executed unless thesis_validity = Invalid. Defense-in-depth against the false-positive sell pattern (Taiwan / China A / Glb Clmt Chg with strong metrics).
guards._skip_sell_below_conviction_unless_thesi: Override the conviction floor for sells when thesis is Invalid (e.g. catalyst broke). These are decisive exits regardless of conviction.
guards._skip_buy_below_conviction_doc: Buys with conviction < 0.30 are not executed. Lower threshold than sells — buys are reversible (you can always sell).

sizing._scale_buys_by_conviction_rank_doc: When sum(buys) > deployable cash, scale all buys proportionally by descending conviction. Highest-conviction buy keeps closest to its requested amount.
sizing._smallest_first_when_shrinking_doc: If true, shrink the smallest (lowest-rank) buys to zero first. If false (default), proportional scaling.
sizing._drop_buy_if_falls_below_min_trade_doc: After scaling, any buy below min_trade_kr is dropped entirely, freeing cash for the remaining buys.

rotation_pair_handling._execute_atomically_if_possible_doc: When a Sell + Buy share rotation_pair_id, prefer to execute both legs together. Sell proceeds fund the Buy.
rotation_pair_handling._if_one_leg_fails_doc: If one leg can't execute (e.g. Buy half breaches concentration cap), execute the other leg alone and surface as constraint_violations entry. Don't cancel both.

_default_buy_target_pct_doc: When step 6 doesn't specify a recommended_weight, use 5% of deployable per Buy. Will be overridden by conviction-based scaling when buys compete for cash.
